title: rnaseq-flow pipeline parameters
description: A modular bulk RNA-seq analysis pipeline (Nextflow DSL2).

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Pipeline input data and where results are written.

input.description: Path to the CSV samplesheet (columns: sample,R1,R2,condition).

outdir.description: Directory where pipeline results are published.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to publish files into the output directory.

tracedir.description: Directory for execution reports, timeline and trace (defaults to <outdir>/pipeline_info).

stop_at.description: Stop the pipeline after a given stage.

alignment_quantification_options.title: Alignment and quantification
alignment_quantification_options.description: Choice of aligner and library strandedness.

aligner.description: Read aligner / quantifier to use (one per run).

strandedness.description: Library strandedness; 'auto' infers it per-sample from RSeQC.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference files and pre-built aligner indices.

gtf.description: Gene annotation in GTF format (may be gzipped). Required for most analyses.

transcript_fasta.description: Transcript FASTA - used for Salmon/Kallisto index building and IsoformSwitchAnalyzeR.

star_index.description: Path to a pre-built STAR index directory.

hisat2_index.description: Path to a pre-built HISAT2 index directory.

salmon_index.description: Path to a pre-built Salmon index directory.

kallisto_index.description: Path to a pre-built Kallisto index file.

gmt.description: GMT gene-set file used by GSEA.

organism.description: Organism ID for gProfiler and MSigDB (e.g. hsapiens, mmusculus).

ctat_lib.description: CTAT genome library directory. Providing it enables STAR-Fusion.

dtu.description: Run DEXSeq differential transcript usage testing (requires --aligner salmon or kallisto, and --gtf).

diffsplice.description: Run edgeR diffSpliceDGE differential splicing - exon-level usage for STAR/HISAT2, transcript-level usage for Salmon/Kallisto (requires --gtf).

design.description: DESeq2/edgeR model formula, e.g. '~ batch + condition'. Default: '~ batch + condition' if the samplesheet has a batch column, otherwise '~ condition'. Covariates must be samplesheet columns and 'condition' must be included (it is the variable contrasted).

download_release.description: Ensembl release to pin for reproducibility, e.g. 102. Default: current/latest.

download_gmt.description: Also download MSigDB GMT gene sets for the organism.

genome_fasta.description: Genome FASTA for index building (STAR / HISAT2 / Salmon).

max_resource_options.title: Max resource options
max_resource_options.description: Ceilings applied to per-process resource requests.

max_cpus.description: Maximum number of CPUs a single process may request.

max_memory.description: Maximum memory a single process may request (e.g. 128.GB).

max_time.description: Maximum wall-time a single process may request (e.g. 240.h).

help.description: Display the parameter help message and exit.
